bullets: Officially licensed Sonic the Hedgehog collectible statue — Standard Edition
Sonic depicted in a dynamic pose, revving up to run faster than the speed of sound
Base inspired by Green Hill Zone with a rotating Star Post checkpoint (up to 90 degrees)
Housed in a beautifully designed collector's box that doubles as a diorama backdrop
content.description:
The highly detailed Sonic PVC statue is seen striking a dynamic pose, revving up to run faster than the speed of sound. The base design is inspired by the Green Hill Zone, and on it is also the Star Post checkpoint, which you can rotate up to 90 degrees, allowing for multiple viewing angles.
The statue is housed in a beautifully designed collector's box, which can also turn and double as a diorama backdrop for added visual aesthetics.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• SONIC THE HEDGEHOG: SONIC 11" PVC Standard Edition Painted statue
• Collectors Box
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
